text: What are you doing, Carrie? What do you see? I want to spray with the clothes. I want to spray with the fire. I want to spray with this fire. Spider? Oh, fire? That's tiki torch. Carrie, thank you. It's okay. Don't spray that. Thank you. Sit back down. Where's your shoes, girl? There's a fire. It's another tiki torch. Thank you. Good job. Thanks, Carrie. Don't spray the bicycle.
